## nicificated remnawave oas3 schema

<div align="center">
    <a href="https://www.openapis.org/"><img alt="oas version" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fnibelregion%2Fremnawave%2Frefs%2Fheads%2Fmain%2Fremnawave.json&query=%24.openapi&prefix=v&style=flat-square&logo=openapiinitiative&label=oas&labelColor=black&color=gray"></img></a>
    <a href="https://github.com/remnawave"><img alt="remnawave version" src="https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fnibelregion%2Fremnawave%2Frefs%2Fheads%2Fmain%2Fremnawave.json&query=%24.info.version&prefix=v&style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage%2Fsvg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPHN0b3Agc3RvcC1jb2xvcj0iI2ZmZmZmZiI%2BPC9zdG9wPjxzdG9wIG9mZnNldD0iMSIgc3RvcC1jb2xvcj0iIzY2NjY2NiI%2BPC9zdG9wPjwvcmFkaWFsR3JhZGllbnQ%2BPHJhZGlhbEdyYWRpZW50IGlkPSJyYiIgY3g9IjAiIGN5PSIwIiByPSIxIiBncmFkaWVudFVuaXRzPSJ1c2VyU3BhY2VPblVzZSIgZ3JhZGllbnRUcmFuc2Zvcm09InRyYW5zbGF0ZSgyNTYpIHJvdGF0ZSg5MCkgc2NhbGUoNTEyKSI%%2BPC9wYXRoPjwvc3ZnPjwvc3ZnPg%3D%3D&label=remnawave&labelColor=black&color=gray&cacheSeconds=3600"></img></a>
</div>

nicifications:

- converted duplicate objects into a single objects
- no inline objects, only references to named objects
- all removed controllers, fields, parameters, and objects are marked as `deprecated`
- enums as separate objects with specific names

enjoy ^_^
